items.description: A keyboard-shortcut hint chip for surfacing shortcuts next to actions

items.description: A command menu / palette (cmdk) for keyboard-driven navigation and actions, reusable across apps

items.description: A card that appears when the user hovers over an element, providing additional information or actions

items.description: A form control that allows users to input numeric values with increment and decrement buttons

items.description: A component for navigating through multiple pages of content

items.description: A component that allows users to input a sequence of characters, typically used for entering PIN codes or short passwords

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: A popup element that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it

items.title: Rating Group
items.description: A component that allows users to rate items using a star or other rating system

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons—known as radio buttons—where no more than one of the buttons can be checked at a time

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content of the screen.

items.title: Slider
items.description: A control that allows users to select a value or range from a given range

items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content that display one panel of content at a time

items.name: tags-input
items.title: Tags Input
items.description: A component that allows users to input and manage a list of tags or keywords

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it

items.name: file-upload
items.title: File Upload
items.description: A file upload component with drag and drop support for selecting and uploading files

items.name: timer
items.title: Timer
items.description: A timer component that can record elapsed time or countdown from a target time

items.name: tour
items.title: Tour
items.description: A guided tour component that highlights elements on the page and provides instructions or information

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A component for displaying tabular data with customizable styles

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A customizable select dropdown component for choosing options from a list

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: A skeleton component for displaying loading placeholders

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: A collapsible sidebar component with customizable content and responsive design.

items.name: rich-text-editor
items.title: Rich Text Editor
items.description: A friendly Lexical rich-text editor with a minimal toolbar (bold, italic, lists, links) and a sanitized HTML renderer.

items.name: auto-layout
items.title: Auto Layout
items.description: Pure elk-powered auto-layout for React Flow graphs, with dangling-edge and duplicate-id guards.

items.name: serialize
items.title: Serialize
items.description: Versioned, JSON-serializable snapshot helpers for React Flow graphs that strip transient render state.

items.name: edge-geometry
items.title: Edge Geometry
items.description: Pure geometry helpers that pick the best connection sides between two node rectangles.

items.name: node-themes
items.title: Node Themes
items.description: Semantic node themes driven by design-system tokens, plus a resolver for custom theme objects.

items.name: use-auto-layout
items.title: Use Auto Layout
items.description: React Flow hook that runs auto-layout over the current nodes and edges, then fits the view.

items.name: smart-edge
items.title: Smart Edge
items.description: A React Flow v12 edge that auto-connects to the nearest sides of its source and target nodes.

items.name: base-node
items.title: Base Node
items.description: A themed React Flow node component with header, body, footer, and connection handles, registrable as a node type.

items.name: flow-canvas
items.title: Flow Canvas
items.description: A themed React Flow wrapper that owns the provider and registers the built-in base node and smart edge types.
